Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 ANXI_MEDICAID_EVER Anxiety Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 ANXI_MEDICARE_EVER Anxiety Disorders - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 BIPL_COMBINED Bipolar Disorder - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 BIPL_MEDICAID Bipolar Disorder - Medicaid
